name: EMSArrestContext
title: EMS Cardiac Arrest Context
description: Contextual data for NEMSIS eArrest not directly representable in FHIR Condition: witnessed-by, resuscitation actions, AED use, CPR type, therapeutic hypothermia, ROSC, neurological outcome, end-of-event, and first-responder roles.

element.definition: Contextual data for NEMSIS eArrest not directly representable in FHIR Condition: witnessed-by, resuscitation actions, AED use, CPR type, therapeutic hypothermia, ROSC, neurological outcome, end-of-event, and first-responder roles.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

element.definition: Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces.

slicing.description: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url

element.definition: May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension.
element.comment: There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone.

element.definition: Contextual data for NEMSIS eArrest not directly representable in FHIR Condition: witnessed-by, resuscitation actions, AED use, CPR type, therapeutic hypothermia, ROSC, neurological outcome, end-of-event, and first-responder roles.

element.comment: NEMSIS eArrest.01. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded.
NEMSIS eArrest.02. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded.

element.short: eArrest.03 - Resuscitation Attempted By This Unit
element.comment: NEMSIS eArrest.03. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded. Repeating (1..M).
NEMSIS eArrest.04. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded. Repeating (1..M).

element.short: eArrest.07 - AED Use Prior to EMS Arrival
element.comment: NEMSIS eArrest.07. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded.
NEMSIS eArrest.09. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded. Repeating (1..M).
NEMSIS eArrest.10. Usage: Optional. Whether TH was initiated.

element.short: eArrest.11 - First Monitored Cardiac Rhythm of the Patient
element.comment: NEMSIS eArrest.11. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded.

element.short: eArrest.12 - Any Return of Spontaneous Circulation
element.comment: NEMSIS eArrest.12. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded. Repeating (1..M).

element.short: eArrest.13 - Neurological Outcome at Hospital Discharge
element.comment: NEMSIS eArrest.13. Usage: Optional. Cerebral performance category (CPC).
NEMSIS eArrest.14. Usage: Required/National. Nillable. NV: NotRecorded. PN: ExamFindingNotPresent, UnableToComplete.
NEMSIS eArrest.16. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded. Repeating (1..M).

element.short: eArrest.17 - Cardiac Rhythm on Arrival at Destination
element.comment: NEMSIS eArrest.17. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded. Uses cardiac rhythm codes (9901xxx). Repeating (1..M).

element.short: eArrest.18 - End of EMS Cardiac Arrest Event
element.comment: NEMSIS eArrest.18. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded.
NEMSIS eArrest.20. Usage: Required/National. NV: NotRecorded.

element.short: eArrest.21 - Who First Applied the AED
